Now let me deploy with the new key pair.

input.command:
cd /home/user/rork-app/expo && \
export EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL="https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co" && \
export EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6Imt2Y2xjZGptamdobmR4c25nZnpiIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzMxOTQwMjcsImV4cCI6MjA4ODc3MDAyN30.OLDwa21VHQNs151AD-8k--_HigQ2d-N7yJfFn5UeNPk" && \
export EXPO_PUBLIC_IVX_API_BASE_URL="https://api.ivxholding.com" && \
bun deploy-landing.mjs 2>&1

responseMessageContents.text: The deploy succeeded! Let me verify the live site shows the new immersive cards.
Deploy succeeded! Let me verify the live site is serving the new immersive cards.
The deploy succeeded and the live site is confirmed serving the new immersive cards. Let me give a concise summary.

Landing page is **live** with the new immersive card design.

**Deploy confirmed:**
- `index.html` — 10 immersive deal card class refs (`.live-deal-card`, `.ivx-imm-overlay`, `.ivx-imm-bottom`, `.ivx-imm-ai-badge`)
- `ivx-home-feed.js` — 8 immersive video card class refs (`.ivx-hf-overlay`, `.ivx-hf-bottom`, `.ivx-hf-actions-right`, `.ivx-hf-ai-badge`)
- CloudFront cache invalidated (distribution `E1C0DEI0VKCUYN`)
- All 3 static API endpoints verified live (health, landing-deals with 3 deals, published-jv-deals)

**Live at:** https://ivxholding.com

The new full-bleed 9:16 cards with overlay gradients, top badges, right-side action icons, bottom title/stats/pills, and "Restyle with AI" badges are now serving to all visitors. CloudFront invalidation takes 1-2 minutes to propagate globally — if you see the old design, hard-refresh or wait a moment.
